'''shavanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jilbaab|jilbaab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jilbaab|jilbaab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shavanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævængæth|shævængæth]] || [[word:shævængæj|shævængæj]] || [[word:shævængæsh|shævængæsh]] || [[word:shævængæ|shævængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavavangath|shavavangath]] || [[word:shavavangaj|shavavangaj]] || [[word:shavavangash|shavavangash]] || [[word:shavavanga|shavavanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavangath|shavangath]] || [[word:shavangaj|shavangaj]] || [[word:shavangash|shavangash]] || [[word:shavanga|shavanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavafngath|shavafngath]] || [[word:shavafngaj|shavafngaj]] || [[word:shavafngash|shavafngash]] || [[word:shavafngaf|shavafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavangatha|shavangatha]] || [[word:shavangaja|shavangaja]] || [[word:shavangasha|shavangasha]] || [[word:shavangaka|shavangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavangath|shavangath]] || [[word:shavangaj|shavangaj]] || [[word:shavangash|shavangash]] || [[word:shavanga|shavanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavangathal|shavangathal]] || [[word:shavangajal|shavangajal]] || [[word:shavangashal|shavangashal]] || [[word:shavangakal|shavangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavangathatha|shavangathatha]] || [[word:shavangajaja|shavangajaja]] || [[word:shavangashasha|shavangashasha]] || [[word:shavangaka|shavangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavangathan|shavangathan]] || [[word:shavangajan|shavangajan]] || [[word:shavangashan|shavangashan]] || [[word:shavangakan|shavangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavangathaoro|shavangathaoro]] || [[word:shavangajaoro|shavangajaoro]] || [[word:shavangashaoro|shavangashaoro]] || [[word:shavangakaoro|shavangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
